product_overview: DevSync is a project management and team collaboration frontend that lets users authenticate and manage teams from a centralized dashboard. The initial product surface focuses on secure sign-up/sign-in and team creation/management flows.
core_goals: Provide secure email/password authentication and onboarding for users
Enable teams to be created and organized so projects and members can be grouped
Offer a central authenticated dashboard as the entrypoint for team workflows
Deliver clear happy-path and error handling for core flows to support reliable user onboarding

features.name: User Authentication
features.description: Allow users to create accounts and sign in with email and password to access authenticated areas of the app.
user_flows: Navigate to /login -> Fill email input field -> Fill password input field -> Submit credentials to authenticate -> Receive successful authentication and redirect to /dashboard -> See dashboard content

Navigate to /login -> Fill email input field with unregistered email or malformed email -> Fill password input field -> Submit credentials to authenticate -> See authentication error or validation message

Navigate to / -> Choose to create an account -> Fill email input field -> Fill password input field -> Submit sign-up information -> Receive successful authentication and redirect to /dashboard -> See dashboard content

Navigate to / -> Choose to create an account -> Fill email input field with already-registered email or invalid format -> Fill password input field -> Submit sign-up information -> See sign-up error or validation message

features.name: Teams Management
features.description: Enable authenticated users to create and manage teams so collaborators can be grouped and organized for projects.
user_flows: Navigate to /dashboard -> Initiate create team -> Enter team name -> Save team -> See new team listed in teams section
Navigate to /dashboard -> Initiate create team -> Enter invalid or duplicate team name -> Save team -> See team creation error or validation message
Navigate to /dashboard -> Open an existing team from the teams list -> Update team name or metadata -> Save changes -> See updated team information
Navigate to /dashboard -> Open an existing team from the teams list -> Attempt to save changes with invalid data -> See team update error or validation message

features.name: User Authentication
features.description: User can sign up and sign in using email and password
